---
name: all-in-one-plan-task
description: "Use the All-in-one-plan Assistant to complete a focused repository task using the current workspace context."
---

Use the All-in-one-plan repository context to accomplish a single, well-scoped development task.

Task: {{task}}

If available, also consider the selected file(s) or folder(s) in the current editor.

Respond with:
- a concise plan or implementation
- file changes needed
- code snippets or exact edits when appropriate
- any assumptions or follow-up questions if the task is unclear

Examples:
- "Implement a new backend API endpoint for contact creation in BACKEND (REAL API CORE)."
- "Refactor `server.js` to use async/await for route handlers."
- "Review the React frontend folder and suggest cleanup for unused dependencies."
